details.question: What are the main characteristics of the Transformer architecture?
details.answer: The Transformer is a Transduction Model that uses Attention Mechanisms and relies on a Self-Attention Mechanism. It has components including an Encoder and a Decoder, and the Encoder includes Encoding-Decoding. The Encoder also uses Multi-Head Self-Attention Mechanism, Position-Wise Fully Connected Feed-Forward Network, Residual Connection, and Layer Normalization.
